pkgmetadata.longdescription: funasr_onnx provides ONNX Runtime-based inference for FunASR speech recognition models. It supports Paraformer ASR, VAD (Voice Activity Detection), and punctuation restoration models for Chinese speech recognition without requiring PyTorch.
funasr_onnx提供基于ONNX Runtime的FunASR语音识别模型推理。它支持 Paraformer语音识别、VAD（语音活动检测）和标点恢复模型，用于中文语音 识别，无需依赖PyTorch。
